reviews.comment:
Estacion de Servicio que fue remodelada completamente y muy importante para el paso del turista atravesando de una provincia a otra. Me llamo altamente la atencion porque carece de surtidores a pesar de ser una gran estacion de servicio. Por la dimension que resulta la misma es muy evidente la espera de varios minutos que hay que hacer al esperar a ser atendido por los empleados. Despues el servicompras enorme. Ojala q a la posterioridad agregen mas surtidores.
Me olvidaba el precio de las naftas alli en la actualidad mas caros que la provincia vecina de Cordoba.
Al pasar a cargar combustible rara vez pasan la tarjeta Serviclub porque no funciona pero tampoco te dan comprobante alguno.

(Translated by Google)
This gas station was completely remodeled and is very important for tourists crossing from one province to another. What really caught my attention was the lack of pumps, despite being a large station. Given its size, the wait to be served by the staff is quite noticeable. Then there's the enormous convenience store. I hope they add more pumps in the future.
I forgot to mention that gasoline prices there are currently higher than in the neighboring province of Córdoba. When you go to fill up, they rarely accept the Serviclub card because it doesn't work, and they don't give you any kind of receipt either.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNjbklXdU9BEAE

reviews.comment:
Única estación ypf en más de 100 km a la redonda, y tienen sólo dos surtidores de nafta...si vas un domingo por la tarde,prepárate a esperar si querés cargar. La mayoría de las veces no les anda el sistema para recibir tarjetas de débito o crédito,mercado pago. El aire para las ruedas no funciona(aunque te dicen que sí). Lo único bueno es el bar shop, bien atendido,y precios normales.

(Translated by Google)
The only YPF station for over 100 km around, and they only have two gas pumps... if you go on a Sunday afternoon, be prepared to wait if you want to fill up. Most of the time their system for accepting debit or credit cards, or Mercado Pago, isn't working. The tire inflator doesn't work (even though they tell you it does). The only good thing is the convenience store, with good service and reasonable prices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5My1DWEZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Publico esta calificación porque al volver de Santiago del Estero nos damos con que no aceptaban tarjeta de débito (siendo que cuando fuimos tres días previos si era aceptado este medio de pago). Una verdadera complicación para quienes transitábamos por ahí, de casualidad contar con efectivo para poder cargar Nafta, ellos sabiendo que es uno de los pocos lugares donde se puede hacer. Mínimo deberían de exponer carteles aclarando esta situación y  uno poder no consumir (nafta, freeshop).

(Translated by Google)
I'm posting this review because upon returning from Santiago del Estero, we discovered they weren't accepting debit cards (even though they were accepted three days prior). This was a real problem for those of us passing through, who were lucky enough to have cash to buy gas, especially since they know it's one of the few places where you can. At the very least, they should post signs explaining this policy so people can avoid making purchases (gasoline, duty-free).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5ODR6dUdREAE
